name: Hoax.ai Evidence Posture Workbench Interface Accessibility and Performance Rules
accessibility_rules: one primary H1 requirement for future page
text fallback for visual relation/state maps
no meaning conveyed by color alone
dependency_rules: prefer HTML/CSS-first when implementation is eventually authorized
avoid external libraries unless separately justified
non_authorization_statement: Accessibility and performance rules define future constraints only. They do not authorize interface implementation, prototype, engine, or deployment.
